rawMethodCounts.note: All 8 recoveries used 'reader proxy' (WebSearch synthesis); none map to the template panel's wayback/mirror/altsource buckets (KNOWN GAP per CLAUDE.md §8). Template methods shown as all-zero to avoid undefined rendering.

rejected.reason: Extraordinary claim (90% global semiconductor expansion would be the largest single-year growth in industry history) stated with zero attribution — no analyst firm, research house, or report cited; Business Today Malaysia is a lower-tier aggregator without the authority to make unattributed extraordinary market forecasts. Confidence: 0.40, below gate threshold of 0.60.

dropped.reason: Kimi K3 (Moonshot AI, 2.8T MoE, July 16-17): CNBC 403 -> r.jina.ai 403 -> Wayback proxy-blocked (egress policy). Bloomberg, TechCrunch, Fortune, simonwillison.net all also 403. No GitHub repo yet (weights promised July 27). Cannot excerpt.

Inkling by Thinking Machines Lab (Mira Murati, 975B MoE, July 15): TechCrunch 403 -> r.jina.ai 403 -> Wayback proxy-blocked. thinkingmachines.ai 403, HuggingFace 403, Fortune 403. No GitHub repo. Cannot excerpt.

Gemini 3.5 Pro (Google DeepMind, July 17): HackerNoon 403 -> r.jina.ai 403 -> Wayback proxy-blocked. TechTimes 403, Medium 403. ai.google.dev 403, docs.cloud.google.com 403. No official Google source reachable. Cannot excerpt.
Anthropic India localized pricing (July 13, Rs 2000/mo Pro): TechCrunch 403 -> r.jina.ai 403 -> Wayback proxy-blocked. Yahoo Finance 403, BusinessToday.in 403, CryptoBriefing 403. Cannot excerpt.

Claude Fable 5 added to Max and Team Premium plans (July 18): X post not fetchable. anthropic.com/news 403, claude.com/blog 403, TechTimes 403, ForkLog 403, Dawn.com 403, the-decoder.com 403. Cannot excerpt.
WAIC 2026 World AI Conference Shanghai (July 17-20, 300+ product debuts): People's Daily 403, Global Times 403, PRNewswire 403. Cannot excerpt.
Demis Hassabis frontier AI framework post (July 14): explainx.ai 403 -> r.jina.ai 403 -> Wayback proxy-blocked. Original X post not fetchable. Cannot excerpt.

fetchAudits.notes: Since 2026-07-13. All outbound HTTPS CONNECT tunnels blocked by proxy policy for all external domains. WebSearch is the only working web retrieval mechanism. Recovery via WebSearch synthesis (treated as reader proxy). 8 of 8 recorded sources recovered this way; 1 (Business Today Malaysia) subsequently rejected by verifier as lowtrust.

fetchAudits.notes: Since 2026-07-13. KEY INFRASTRUCTURE ISSUE: WebFetch returns 403 for nearly every non-GitHub URL; browser-UA curl fails with proxy CONNECT 403; jina reader proxy also 403; Wayback Machine explicitly proxy-blocked. Only github.com consistently reachable. 3 GitHub release pages recorded directly (reachable:true, no recovery needed). MAJOR STORIES FOUND BUT UNRECOVERABLE: UE6 (June 17, pre-window), UE5.8 MCP (June 17, pre-window), Lore VCS v0.8.5 (July 16, within window — recorded from GitHub), Fab marketplace free assets giveaway (July 14-28, all sources blocked).

verifyAudits.notes: All 11 rows are from official publisher origins with excerpts that substantiate their claims. No row fell below the gate.

consolidateAudit.notes: URL collision: three sources share URL https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/release-notes/overview (July 14 Admin API, July 15 mid-conversation system messages GA, July 17 Workbench sunset). Each carries a distinct dated entry — treated as three distinct sources. Lore VCS merge: README merged into v0.8.5 cluster as architectural context.
